350 GG0170J1_WLK_50_2_TURN_STRT_CD GG0170J1_WLK_50_2_TURN_STRT_CD GG0170J1 Admission Performance Walk 50 Feet Code. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's ability to walk at least 50 feet and make two turns at the time of admission. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal assistance
03 = Partial/moderate assistance
04 = Supervision or touching assistance
05 = Setup or clean-up assistance
06 =
